description: Fix review issues: (1) History prepend race - disable composer until history loads, (2) No deduplication on reconnect - use ref to track if history already loaded, (3) _persist_exchange pair assumption - add role validation guards.
steps: In frontend/hooks/useChatSocket.ts: add a historyLoadedRef to prevent re-fetching on reconnect. In the ws.on('open') handler, check the ref before fetching. Clear messages before prepending history. Disable sends while loadingHistory is true.
In frontend/components/chat/ChatExperience.tsx: pass disabled={connection === 'disconnected' || loadingHistory} to all ChatComposer instances so the user cannot send before history finishes loading.

In backend/app/main.py: improve _persist_exchange to walk backward through conversation_history looking for the latest user and assistant messages rather than blindly assuming [-2] is user and [-1] is assistant. Add explicit role validation.
acceptance_criteria: Composer is disabled while loadingHistory is true
Reconnect does not duplicate history messages
_persist_exchange validates roles and handles cases where last two entries are not user+assistant
findings: All three priority issues fixed. Frontend build and lint pass. Python syntax valid. Issue #1 (auth token in query string) left as-is since it follows existing project patterns used by all other endpoints. Issue #5 (unbounded growth) addressed with a comment noting future TTL/pruning need.
